content: B1: Breakdown complete/close syncs linked WO (PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE/CLOSED) + WO admin close auto-closes breakdown
B2: Editable start/end times on breakdown complete + WO complete (backend), RCA uses edited downtime, remove mandatory root_cause
B3: list_breakdowns open_total + warnings generate-wo endpoint + public start_time
B4: Line availability formula fix (union intervals, window-based) in routers_core
B5: PM PDF fixes - embedded logo, outlined checkboxes, date param
F2: RepairBreakdown - remove root cause, add start/end time pickers
F3: WO CompleteDialog + WODetailModal time pickers with showPicker
F4: Remove FINAL CLOSE from MachineDrawer
F5: Breakdowns subtitle open count + warning click dialog with WO link/generate
F6: Line KPI card click filters Digital Twin (sync state)
F7: Report form editable Start Time picker
F8: ClosePMTask editable Date + PDF date param
